title: Smoky Quinoa Pilaf
description: A flavorful and nutritious quinoa pilaf with a smoky twist, great for a quick dinner or lunch.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add the quinoa and cook, stirring constantly, for 2-3 minutes.
Add the pilaf and cook, stirring constantly, for 2-3 minutes.
Add the smoky, lemon juice, parsley, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the quinoa is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the quinoa pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
